name: Userlens
long_description:
Companies today are growing faster than ever with smaller teams. We are making it possible for these lean, AI-native companies to manage enterprise deals. 

Userlens is building the AI customer success manager. Our goal is to be the CSM for every customer at every company. 

Every $1-5M of new revenue requires another CSM hire. Userlens breaks that ceiling. Our agents research accounts, catch churn before it happens, and drive renewals and upsells like a top-tier CSM would. 

We're at $307K ARR, growing 127% month over month, with 30 customers including Smartly (300M ARR). Over 300 CSMs are on Userlens, and 76% of them use it weekly. 

Built by second-time founders who lived this problem at their last startup.
one_liner: Agents that renew and expand six and seven-figure enterprise software
